comments: Only the Whitesnake set is available.

transcript.text: By Whitesnake for 46 minutes.
You play this one in English.
If you play it, it's called Walking in the Shadow of the Blues.
This is BBC Radio 1 on the Friday Rock Show and we're presenting Whitesnake on stage at Reading.
And now we're going to continue with a piece of music that you hear every Saturday afternoon at 4 o'clock.
The tracks that you heard were Breakdown, Belgian Tom's Hattrick, which is the rock on theme,
Mistreated, Steal Away and Ain't No Love in the Heart of the City and Walking in the Shadow of the Blues.
and Whitesnake are David Coverdale on vocals,
Bernie Marsden, vocals and guitar,
Neil Murray on the bass, John Lord on the keyboards,
Mick Moody on the guitar and vocals,
and Ian Pace on the drums.
On-site recording and production was by Mike Robinson and Tony Wilson
and remix was by Mike Engles and Bill Aitken.
Don't forget that they have a new album out at the moment.
It's called Love Hunter.
Now, next week on the Friday Rock Show,
we'll either have for you Peter Gabriel from Reading
or Rush in concert.
We're not sure which, but it'll be one of the two, and it'll be good, just like that was.
